testcase.name: date utilities > formatDate > should format a date to ISO string (YYYY-MM-DD)
date utilities > formatDate > should handle dates at midnight
date utilities > formatDate > should handle dates at end of day
date utilities > addDays > should add positive days to a date
date utilities > addDays > should add negative days to a date
date utilities > addDays > should not mutate the original date
date utilities > addDays > should handle adding zero days
date utilities > addDays > should handle month boundaries
date utilities > addDays > should handle year boundaries
date utilities > isSameDay > should return true for same day
date utilities > isSameDay > should return false for different days
date utilities > isSameDay > should return false for different months
date utilities > isSameDay > should return false for different years
date utilities > isSameDay > should handle different times on same day
format utilities > formatCurrency > should format USD currency correctly
format utilities > formatCurrency > should format zero correctly
format utilities > formatCurrency > should format negative numbers correctly
format utilities > formatCurrency > should handle large numbers
format utilities > formatCurrency > should format with custom currency
format utilities > formatCurrency > should format with GBP currency
format utilities > formatCurrency > should handle decimal precision
format utilities > formatNumber > should format numbers with commas
format utilities > formatNumber > should format zero correctly
format utilities > formatNumber > should format negative numbers
format utilities > formatNumber > should handle decimal numbers
format utilities > formatNumber > should format small numbers
format utilities > formatNumber > should handle very large numbers
format utilities > truncate > should truncate string longer than length
format utilities > truncate > should not truncate string shorter than length
format utilities > truncate > should not truncate string equal to length
format utilities > truncate > should handle empty string
format utilities > truncate > should handle length of zero
format utilities > truncate > should handle unicode characters
format utilities > truncate > should preserve original string when not truncated
